_comment: Static search entries for hand-authored pages (publications, projects, key sections). Articles and talks are indexed separately from data/articles.json and data/videos.json, which sync_feeds.py keeps current. Edit this file when you add a publication or project.

items.title: Understanding the Rejection of Fixes Generated by Agentic Pull Requests
items.snippet: Qualitative analysis of 306 non-merged agentic pull requests: 46.41% of agent fixes are rejected, across 14 reasons in 4 categories. MSR 2026 Mining Challenge (ICSE).

items.title: Evaluating Open-Source LLMs for Automated Essay Scoring: The Critical Role of Prompt Design
items.snippet: How prompt design drives open-source LLM performance on automated essay scoring. Preprint, drawn from the M.Sc. thesis.

items.title: Morphology-guided Prompt Engineering for Arabic Dialect Translation with Arabic LLMs
items.snippet: Morphology-aware prompting for Arabic dialect translation using Arabic LLMs. Submitted to an international journal, under review.

items.title: Predicting Student Retention in Smart Learning Environments Using Machine Learning
items.snippet: ML models for student-retention prediction in smart learning environments. Springer; Best Paper Award, ICBT Istanbul 2023.

items.title: GitHub Agentic PR Dataset
items.snippet: ~1.96M GitHub pull requests from AI coding agents and humans, joined to 6.7M commits and 55M file-level diffs. Open data (CC-BY-4.0) on Hugging Face.

items.title: mabujadallah.github.io
items.snippet: This site — a hand-built, dependency-free portfolio with a GitHub PR/diff design system, persisted dark mode, and daily feed automation. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS.

items.title: Portfolio feed-sync
items.snippet: A stdlib-only Python job, run by a daily GitHub Action, that syncs Medium articles and YouTube videos into versioned JSON and auto-commits.

items.title: Android + AI-agent demos
items.snippet: Hands-on Android Studio builds wiring AI coding agents and on-device AI into real app workflows, published as walkthroughs.

items.title: UCAS Oracle to web migration
items.snippet: Directed migration of a legacy Oracle system to a modern web platform serving 500+ users at UCAS Gaza — infrastructure, IT policy, and rollout.

items.title: GitHub Agentic PR Dataset — schema & loading
items.snippet: Full schema, fields, and loading examples (Hugging Face datasets, Polars, pandas) for the 39.5M-PR dataset, plus analyses you can run.

items.title: About — Mahmoud Abujadallah
items.snippet: AI-for-software-engineering researcher at ÉTS Montréal. Background, experience, education, and contact.
